newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Melexis showcased ePowertrain sensing and protection ICs at PCIM 2026 (June 9-11, Nuremberg), routine product marketing rather than a guidance, contract or M&A event. No earnings or guidance change in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-AI-nodes screen: thesis explicitly stops short of AI accelerators. Only event is a routine PCIM 2026 sensor showcase, no fundamental shift. Prior case already reconciled the rank down; moving again is churn.
verdicts.bull: Automotive magnetic/current sensing content rises with EV/ADAS; ICs could be repurposed for power/thermal sensing.
verdicts.neutral: Real sensor franchise but pathway to AI compute is indirect; no catalyst in window.
verdicts.bear: Not an AI-accelerator node; +38% YTD on auto recovery, not AI demand, on a strict latent screen.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: EV content-per-vehicle growth and power/thermal sensing repurposing
verdicts.primaryRisk: Automotive cyclicality; no genuine AI-compute exposure
